_comment: Canonical stress-episode sets by indicator_category. Each agent reads episodes from this registry keyed on indicator_category from interpretation_metadata.json. One source of truth — edit here, all pipeline stages pick it up.

rates.label: Dot-Com Crash
rates.rationale: Rate curve steepened sharply as Fed cut; rate-spread dynamics distinct from equity bear market

rates.label: GFC
rates.rationale: Inversion preceded recession by 12+ months; canonical yield curve signal validation

rates.label: Taper Tantrum
rates.rationale: Rapid rate repricing without recession — key test for rate-spread signals outside crisis context

rates.label: 2022 Rates Shock
rates.rationale: Fastest hiking cycle in 40 years; rate-spread signals face structural break test

credit.label: Dot-Com Crash
credit.rationale: HY spread widening as corporate defaults rose with equity bust

credit.label: GFC
credit.rationale: Peak credit stress; HY-IG spread dominant tail event

credit.label: COVID Shock
credit.rationale: Rapid spread widening and Fed credit facility intervention — tests signal adaptivity

credit.label: 2022 Rates Shock
credit.rationale: Gradual spread widening alongside equity re-rating; different mechanism from GFC

activity.label: Dot-Com Crash
activity.rationale: Industrial slowdown preceded equity bear market; leading-indicator test

activity.label: GFC
activity.rationale: Sharpest activity contraction in post-war history; dominant test for activity signals

activity.label: COVID Shock
activity.rationale: Extreme but transient activity collapse; tests signal behavior in fast-recovery regime

activity.label: China/EM Shock
activity.rationale: Activity slowdown + commodity crash without US recession; tests signal in mid-cycle softness

production._comment: Alias for activity — INDPRO, permits, real-economy leading indicators share the same canonical episode set.

episodes.label: Dot-Com Crash
episodes.rationale: Industrial slowdown preceded equity bear market; leading-indicator test

episodes.label: GFC
episodes.rationale: Sharpest activity contraction in post-war history; dominant test for activity signals

episodes.label: COVID Shock
episodes.rationale: Extreme but transient activity collapse; tests signal behavior in fast-recovery regime

episodes.label: China/EM Shock
episodes.rationale: Activity slowdown + commodity crash without US recession; tests signal in mid-cycle softness

volatility.label: Dot-Com Crash
volatility.rationale: Prolonged elevated vol; tests vol-regime signal in sustained drawdown

volatility.label: GFC
volatility.rationale: VIX peaked at 89; extreme regime test

volatility.label: COVID Shock
volatility.rationale: VIX spike + rapid mean-reversion; tests signal in transient vs. sustained vol regimes

volatility.label: 2022 Rates Shock
volatility.rationale: Elevated but not extreme vol; tests signal in grinding bear market

sentiment.label: Dot-Com Crash
sentiment.rationale: Sentiment collapsed from euphoria; leading-indicator test at extremes

sentiment.label: GFC
sentiment.rationale: Deep pessimism sustained; sentiment signals face mean-reversion vs. momentum test

sentiment.label: COVID Shock
sentiment.rationale: Rapid sentiment collapse and recovery; tests signal speed of adaptation

sentiment.label: 2022 Rates Shock
sentiment.rationale: Persistent pessimism under inflation + rate pressure; sustained signal test
